title: Tick Control West Brighton | $125-$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in West Brighton, Staten Island. Protect your family & pets from tick-borne diseases. Call (718) 429-9301 for same-day service.
intro: West Brighton residents face increasing tick populations due to the neighborhood's proximity to parks and green spaces. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses with comprehensive yard treatments. The Best Pest Control NYC offers affordable, effective tick elimination starting at $125 for West Brighton properties.
whyUs: The Best Pest Control NYC has served West Brighton for over a decade with specialized knowledge of Staten Island's unique tick species and seasonal patterns. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while providing long-lasting protection for your outdoor spaces.
localContext: West Brighton's tree-lined streets, proximity to Silver Lake Park, and abundance of single-family homes with yards create ideal conditions for tick populations to thrive. From properties near the Staten Island Expressway to residential areas around Clove Lakes Park, we customize treatments to address West Brighton's specific tick challenges year-round.

faqs.question: When is tick season in West Brighton?
faqs.answer: Tick season in West Brighton typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May through July. However, deer ticks can be active any time temperatures rise above freezing. We recommend starting preventative treatments in early spring and maintaining protection through fall for optimal results.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in West Brighton?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in West Brighton range from $125 to $325 depending on your property size and treatment frequency. Most residential properties with standard-sized yards fall in the $150-$225 range for a single application. We offer seasonal packages that provide better value and continuous protection throughout tick season.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-registered products that are safe for pets and children when applied according to label directions. We typically recommend keeping pets and children inside for 2-3 hours while treatments dry. Once dry, treated areas are completely safe for normal family activities and play.

faqs.question: How quickly will I see results after tick treatment?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in tick activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Our barrier sprays eliminate existing ticks on contact and provide residual protection for 3-4 weeks. For maximum protection in high-risk areas near Silver Lake Park or wooded sections of West Brighton, we recommend treatments every 3-4 weeks during peak season.
